---
title: "Data visualization with ggplot2"
---

```{=html}
<iframe class="slide-deck" src="slides/ggplot.html"></iframe>
```

[Slides in full screen](slides/ggplot.html){target="_blank"} | [Download PDF slides](slides_pdf/ggplot.pdf){download="ggplot.pdf"}

::: {.callout-tip}
## Exercises
Go to the [task page](tasks/ggplot.qmd) for the exercises.
:::

## Resources

- [ggplot2 cheatsheet](https://rstudio.github.io/cheatsheets/data-visualization.pdf): overview of all ggplot2 possibilities

- [Curated list of ggplot2 resources](https://github.com/erikgahner/awesome-ggplot2): tutorials (sorted by topic and difficulty), books, additional packages, ...

- [R graph gallery](https://www.r-graph-gallery.com/): browse hundreds of plot types with reproducible code

- [ggplot2 tutorial by Cedric Scherer](https://www.cedricscherer.com/2019/08/05/a-ggplot2-tutorial-for-beautiful-plotting-in-r/): in-depth tutorial covering many plot types

- [ggplot2 extension packages](https://exts.ggplot2.tidyverse.org/gallery/): gallery of packages that extend ggplot2
